message:
fix(frankensqlite): use to_string() instead of clone() for SqliteValue::Text

Replace s.clone() with s.to_string() when extracting text values from
SQLite rows in table_names(). This avoids a type mismatch if the inner
string representation changes (e.g., from String to Cow or Arc<str>),
making the conversion explicit and future-proof.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
